# mailcow_resource (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mailcow_resource" "boardroom" {
  local_part        = "boardroom"
  domain            = "example.com"
  description       = "Main boardroom"
  kind              = "location"
  multiple_bookings = -1
  active            = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain for this resource
- `kind` (String) Type of resource: location, group, or thing
- `local_part` (String) Local part of the resource email address (before @)

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether this resource is active
- `description` (String) Description of the resource
- `multiple_bookings` (Number) How many simultaneous bookings are allowed (-1 = unlimited, 1 = one at a time)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
